metadata.description: AWS service icons for DrawIO using built-in mxgraph.aws4 library. Based on AWS Architecture Icons Release 23-2026.01.30 (Complete: Part 1 + Part 2).
metadata.icon_type_guidance: Use service_icon (with resourceIcon wrapper) when labeling the AWS service itself. Use instance_icon (bare shape) when representing a specific resource or instance.
metadata.shape_name_format: Underscore-separated for multi-word names (e.g., step_functions, kinesis_data_streams). Single-word names unchanged (e.g., lambda, ec2). Validated against aws4.xml stencil from github.com/jgraph/drawio.

services.service_name: Amazon Managed Service for Apache Flink
Amazon Managed Streaming for Apache Kafka
Amazon Managed Workflows for Apache Airflow
Red Hat OpenShift Service on AWS
